symbols × 3 TF (1h, 4h, 1d) => 60 markets. • Backtest: Strategy × Market grid; captures StrategyPnL, SymbolPnL, Symbol×TF PnL, Strategy×Symbol×TF PnL. • CIO: ranks markets by PnL score (per Symbol×TF) then allocates with caps (per-market + per-symbol). • Fitness gating: kills dead strategies (0 trades / low PnL / fitness<=0) before CIO recompute.
